name: Ant protect the queen
short_description: Face endless hordes of fierce and powerful invaders. Fight, gain experience, evolve and become stronger to protect the queen.
detailed_description:
Under our eyes there's an endless war! Take on the role of a brave and determined ant who must protect its queen from endless hordes of fierce and powerful invaders. Fight, gain experience, evolve and become stronger to protect your queen.

Combat: The invaders come in large numbers and will be varied, adapt to the enemies, equip weapons to defend yourself and gain experience to earn points and increase your attributes (strength, speed and intelligence).

Evolution: Your warrior ant will undergo a metamorphosis, becoming more powerful depending on the way you choose to evolve, adapting to the way you like to play.

Stunning Pixel Art: Explore a beautifully animated world with detailed retro graphics.
